summary: P1: Route Safety ↔ Heatmap Integration + P2: Command Center Heatmap Widget fully tested. Backend: 20/20 tests passed verifying POST /api/operator/route-safety with heatmap_integrated flag, routes with base_risk_score, heatmap_penalty, heatmap_risk_zones, heatmap_warnings, heatmap_summary; GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/stats with total_zones, critical_zones, high_risk_zones, recent_incidents_7d. Frontend: All UI elements verified - City Heatmap nav link with Globe icon, Command Center City Risk Snapshot widget (cc-city-risk) with red border when critical>0, critical/high/safe counts, risk distribution bar, 'Open Heatmap' link navigating to /operator/city-heatmap; Route Safety heatmap warnings section (route-heatmap-warnings) with alerts and crossing counts, dashed circle markers at heatmap risk zone locations on map.

issues: Console warning: <span> cannot be a child of <select> - causes hydration error but does not break functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Route safety heatmap integration correctly fetches heatmap cells via _fetch_heatmap_cells() and analyzes route crossings via _analyze_route_heatmap()
Heatmap penalty formula correctly implemented: critical_crossings * 0.8 + high_crossings * 0.4, capped at 3.0
Route risk score correctly calculated: min(10.0, base_risk_score + heatmap_penalty)
Heatmap risk zones include grid_id, lat, lng, risk_level, composite_score, forecast_category
Warnings generated for critical/high zone crossings and escalating forecast zones
City heatmap stats endpoint provides lightweight summary for Command Center widget
Frontend CityRiskPanel correctly calculates safe_zones = total - critical - high
Risk distribution bar shows proportional red/orange/green segments
Heatmap risk zone markers on map use dashed circle style with 0.15 fillOpacity for visibility
Minor hydration warning in select element (span inside select) - cosmetic issue only
seed_data_creation: Used existing location_risk_zones (learned_hotspots) and location_incidents data from city heatmap engine
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1+P2 Route Safety Heatmap Integration + Command Center Widget fully functional. Key endpoints: POST /api/operator/route-safety (includes heatmap_integrated, routes with heatmap_penalty/base_risk_score/heatmap_risk_zones/heatmap_warnings/heatmap_summary), GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/stats (total_zones, critical_zones, high_risk_zones, recent_incidents_7d). Frontend data-testid values: cc-city-risk, route-heatmap-warnings, op-nav-city-heatmap. Route evaluation takes ~5-15 seconds due to OSRM + heatmap analysis. Heatmap penalty formula: critical*0.8 + high*0.4, capped at 3.0. Test file: test_route_heatmap_integration.py

backend_api_tests: Route safety response includes heatmap_integrated field
Each route has heatmap_penalty field (capped at 3.0)
Each route has heatmap_risk_zones array with grid_id, lat, lng, risk_level, composite_score
Each route has heatmap_warnings array with descriptive messages
Each route has heatmap_summary with critical_crossings and high_crossings counts
Heatmap penalty matches formula: critical*0.8 + high*0.4
Route safety requires authentication (401 without token)
Heatmap stats has total_zones integer field
Heatmap stats has critical_zones integer field
Heatmap stats has high_risk_zones integer field
Heatmap stats has recent_incidents_7d integer field
Heatmap stats requires authentication (401 without token)
Command Center can use heatmap stats for widget

Command Center page loads with data-testid='command-center'
City Risk Snapshot widget found with data-testid='cc-city-risk'
Widget has red border when critical_zones > 0
Widget displays Critical, High Risk, Safe counts

Heatmap warnings display critical/high zone crossings and escalation alerts
Dashed circle markers appear at heatmap risk zone locations on map
Route summary shows heatmap penalty and base risk score

Each route has base_risk_score, heatmap_penalty, route_risk_score fields
heatmap_risk_zones array contains dangerous cells along route with grid_id, lat, lng, risk_level, composite_score
heatmap_warnings contains descriptive alerts about critical/high crossings and forecast escalations
heatmap_summary has critical_crossings and high_crossings counts
GET /api/operator/city-heatmap/stats returns total_zones, critical_zones, high_risk_zones, recent_incidents_7d
Command Center City Risk Snapshot widget (cc-city-risk) displays risk counts and distribution bar
Widget has red border when critical_zones > 0
Widget includes 'Open Heatmap' link that navigates to /operator/city-heatmap
